title: MEDIUM-INTENSITY PG IN FAVOURABLE CLIMATE, MOSTLY CUT (MF_C)
description: A portrait of medium-intensity permanent grasslands in favourable climates where herbage is primarily harvested by cutting, detailing distribution, management practices, vegetation characteristics, threats and ecosystem service delivery. It includes a case study from the Canton of Solothurn, Switzerland and expert-derived assessments of feed quality, biodiversity and environmental impacts.
